title: Volume 14 of Sadamotos Manga Anybody else got their copy
display_title: Volume 14 of Sadamotos Manga Anybody else got their copy
wikitext:
[]: Volume 14 of Sadamoto's Manga - Anybody else got their copy?             Quote Post by Super Chris » Sat Jan 24, 2015 9:31 am So my preordered copy of volume 14 showed up in the mail the other day, slightly ahead of the February release date I was expecting. Just wondering if anybody else got theirs, since I imagine the manga *finally* concluding after over 20 years would prompt some discussion. The bulk of its contents are already summed up in the wiki, the majority of it can basically be described as a compressed retelling of End of Eva, with the last chapter running off in a new direction. After that, however, there's a bonus chapter that I'm having a hard time following. I don't know, it might make some sense to me if I had seen Rebuild 3.0 (I've been waiting for the US disc release, which at this point is starting to look like it'll never arrive...) SPOILER: Show

[]: Re: Volume 14 of Sadamoto's Manga - Anybody else got their c             Quote Post by Eleven » Sat Jan 24, 2015 10:18 am Super Chris wrote: SPOILER: Show

[]:             Quote Post by pwhodges » Sat Jan 24, 2015 2:07 pm I see the last chapter as just being what it is, in isolation - a bonus, not particularly connected to anything. There's a long discussion of it (covered in spoilers) in the thread here .

[]:             Quote Post by Super Chris » Sat Jan 24, 2015 5:54 pm Well there we go. I usually just check the frontsite and somehow I got the impression that the entire release - not just the US release - had been delayed until February.

[]:             Quote Post by pwhodges » Sat Jan 24, 2015 6:01 pm So you've just received the Viz printing, have you? My (UK) delivery estimate for that is still shown as mid-March! Indeed, Viz list it as a February release. I'm pleased to have the Japanese already.

[]:             Quote Post by Sicarius VI » Sat Jan 24, 2015 6:20 pm I would love if I got the vol14 soon. Maybe they are sending some early for shipping purposes, but I don't know why there would be problems with shipping...

[]:             Quote Post by Super Chris » Sun Jan 25, 2015 7:59 pm pwhodges wrote: So you've just received the Viz printing, have you? My (UK) delivery estimate for that is still shown as mid-March! Indeed, Viz list it as a February release. I'm pleased to have the Japanese already.

[]:             Quote Post by Mario_Abel » Thu Jan 29, 2015 12:32 am Nice! Which website did you make the preorder?

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Sun Feb 08, 2015 2:55 pm Anybody who has their early copies: Did Carl Horn get to write his final thoughts in this volume? I'm curious what he said. Otherwise, what took them so long to release this? He didn't for Volume 13, so hopefully he'll have interesting things to say whenever (you know'll happen soon) a VIZ Vol 13 + 14 (and extras?) Omnibus comes out.

[]:             Quote Post by Dataprime » Tue Feb 10, 2015 2:11 pm Sailor Star Dust wrote: what took them so long to release this?

[]:             Quote Post by pwhodges » Tue Feb 10, 2015 2:25 pm Only another month to wait in the UK - honestly, it would be faster to cancel my Amazon UK order and get it shipped from the US, even now! The only thing stopping me is the stupid cost of shipping from the US - considerably more than faster shipping from Japan, for instance.

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Tue Feb 10, 2015 5:34 pm I got my copy! http://www.evamonkey.com/final-volume-of-neon-genesis-evangelion-manga-released/ Time for a manga binge!

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Tue Feb 10, 2015 5:58 pm tweet-body — twitter-user (@username) date document.querySelectorAll('blockquote.twitter-tweet > a').forEach((t) => t.href = t.href.replace('x.com', 'twitter.com')) I had almost forgot that I pre-ordered it. The other day almost went to Amazon and placed another order.

[]:             Quote Post by FullMetalBiscuit » Thu Feb 12, 2015 9:43 am ^ It comes with the extra volume? Nice! Amazon UK has the date as March 12th, so I still have to wait a while yet :( I already read it online last year, but I look forward to owning it and finishing my collection.

[]:             Quote Post by KnightmareX13 » Thu Feb 12, 2015 1:11 pm picked up a copy today from Barnes and Noble

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Thu Feb 12, 2015 5:04 pm Nobody? Sailor Star Dust wrote: Anybody who has their early copies: Did Carl Horn get to write his final thoughts in this volume? I'm curious what he said. Otherwise, what took them so long to release this?

[]:             Quote Post by Literary Eagle » Thu Feb 12, 2015 8:42 pm Sailor Star Dust wrote: Did Carl Horn get to write his final thoughts in this volume? I'm curious what he said.

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Fri Feb 13, 2015 12:32 am The heck?!

[]:             Quote Post by cyharding » Fri Feb 13, 2015 12:36 am Well, Carl works at Dark Horse now, so I wouldn't think he'd still do anything for Viz.

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Fri Feb 13, 2015 11:02 am cyharding wrote: Well, Carl works at Dark Horse now, so I wouldn't think he'd still do anything for Viz.
